items.title: Workers Are Afraid AI Will Take Their Jobs. They’re Missing the Bigger Danger.
items.description: It isn’t whether artificial intelligence is going to replace them. It’s who will control the knowledge that companies capture from their employees.

items.title: 'The dark side of AI': Wall Street weighs recent stock sell-off over disruption fears
items.description: Investor concerns over AI's disruption drove a stock market sell-off in the wealth management, transportation, and logistics industries last week.

items.title: Salesforce (CRM) is a Great Company, Says Jim Cramer
items.description: We recently published 13 Stocks Jim Cramer Talked About. Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the stocks that Jim Cramer talked about. Customer relationship software products provider Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM)’s shares are down by 41% over the past year and by 25% year-to-date. Early in February, Oppenheimer reiterated a Buy rating and a $300 share […]

items.title: Salesforce AI Push With Cimulate Faces Job Cuts And Ethical Tensions
items.description: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) is acquiring Cimulate, an AI startup focused on intent aware search, to strengthen its Agentforce Commerce platform. The deal comes alongside leadership changes, nearly 1,000 job cuts, and internal pushback over Salesforce's work with ICE and its AI rollout. These developments arrive during a period of share price pressure, with Salesforce stock at $189.72. For investors watching NYSE:CRM, this mix of product expansion and internal disruption is arriving after a...

items.title: Dear Salesforce Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for February 25
items.description: Salesforce is facing sector-wide turbulence, yet sound growth and execution are setting the stage for critical Q4 results.
